svg.title: MalBERT-XAI Architecture Flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from APK input through 4 DistilBERT encoders, cross-attention fusion, to binary and family classification outputs
svg.text: DistilBERT tokenizer — max 512 tokens per view

g.text: Transformer encoder (2 layers, 8 heads) + attention pooling
